creator: ssanders@opnet.com
text:
Sorry I'm behind on this.  I've been working on a 3ware RAID controller
issue and will not be able to get back to this for a while.

For my last pass at this, I upgraded my port to openipmi 2.0.19 but could
not get past initialization (no core drop however).  sample.py complained
of something like 'could not open' as did all of the other utilities in the
package.  This is odd as ipmitool on the same machine was having no issues.

I'm sure that I must have done something wrong but I have not had the time
to work out what.

Thanks

On Wed, 21 Dec 2011 14:10:10 +0300, Alex Deiter <alex.deiter@gmail.com>
wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> Could you update your ports collection?
> Current version for sysutils/openipmi is 2.0.19 and make install package
> works fine:
> 
> [root@blackbox /usr/ports/sysutils/openipmi]# make depends

found

found

found
> ===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
> 
> full log for build package: http://deiter.ru/openipmi.txt
> 
> 
> Thanks!
